# docs(benefits): refresh AIEngineeringTeam.md + SelfEvolution.md (team-of-teams vs loop-engineering; why-care)

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** the institution + self-evolution "why care" undersells; the **team-of-teams (gardener) vs "loop-engineering-is-the-answer"** positioning isn't sharp. The industry believes loop engineering is the solution — it relocates the human, it does not remove them.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Sharpen the team-of-teams-vs-loop-engineering framing: a flat-peer cross-family quorum verifies; the gardener holds the merge gate by governance choice, not technical limit.
- [ ] Each guide follows problem → resolve → why-care → what's-in-it; goose-bumps bar; honest proof.

**Files:** `learn/benefits/AIEngineeringTeam.md`, `learn/benefits/SelfEvolution.md`.
